api: Wasabi Stats API (https://stats.wasabisys.com); real endpoint surface researched against https://docs.wasabi.com/apidocs/wasabi-stats-api and its 4 GET-endpoint sub-pages (docs.wasabi.com/apidocs/stats-api-get-v1standalone-*)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: legacy (and this bundle's prior wave-quarantine-repair version) targeted /v1/stats and /v1/accounts, which are NOT real Wasabi Stats API paths -- the real, currently-documented standalone-account Stats API surface is exactly 4 GET endpoints under /v1/standalone/utilizations, all now researched against docs.wasabi.com. bucket_stats and account_stats are repointed to the real /v1/standalone/utilizations/bucket and /v1/standalone/utilizations paths (same stream names/schemas, corrected wire paths and real PascalCase field names via computed_fields). The 2 single-bucket detail lookups (:bucketName, :bucketNumber) are excluded as duplicate_of bucket_stats: the real API's own docs show all 3 endpoints returning the identical BucketUtilizationNum-keyed record shape, and every field they'd expose is already reachable via bucket_stats' Bucket-name-scoped filtering (client-side) since bucket_stats itself returns every bucket's records. The Control-Account/Sub-Account/Partner Stats endpoints (/v1/utilizations and its sub-account variants, documented at docs.wasabi.com/apidocs/get-utilizations-for-control-and-sub-accounts and neighboring pages) require a separate 'Primary Partner API Key' (Wasabi Account Control / reseller-tier credential) that this connector's spec.json does not collect and is a fundamentally different auth scope from the standalone Root/billing-permission access-key this bundle authenticates with -- excluded as requires_elevated_scope. Legacy is read-only (Write always returns ErrUnsupportedOperation); the Stats API itself has no documented mutation endpoints at all (it is a read-only usage-reporting API), so there is no write surface to model regardless.

excluded.reason: single-bucket-by-name utilization lookup; identical record shape to the bucket_stats stream's per-item object (same BucketUtilizationNum-keyed fields), already covered by that stream which returns all buckets' records in one call
single-bucket-by-number utilization lookup; identical record shape to the bucket_stats stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

Control-Account/Sub-Account aggregate utilization endpoint; requires a Wasabi Account Control (WAC) 'Primary Partner API Key' (reseller/control-account credential), a distinct auth scope this connector's spec.json (a standalone-account Root/billing-permission access key) does not collect or support
